title: E2E Demo

changelog_entries.description: E2E workflow regression test and dogfood script covering all nine phases.
E2E_ARTIFACTS fixtures enriched with production-quality content depth (更多 FR/AC, visual_* fields, richer design options).
full-flow-demo example now generates inspectable artifacts in .taiyi/archive/.

post_launch.metrics: CI pass rate, E2E 耗时, artifact count
post_launch.exit_criteria: 24h 内 E2E pass rate = 100%, 工件完整

rollback_trigger: E2E 测试持续失败 (>2 次重试) 或 verify-report 出现 error
rollback_step2: npm test && npm run build 确认通过
